description: Can plug numbers into formulas but doesn't understand what quantities represent
subject: electricity
diagnosis: Knows WHAT to do but not WHY. Can calculate but can't explain concepts.
symptoms: Cannot explain what current, voltage actually ARE
Fails conceptual questions even though calculations work
Specific: correct on elec_mech_01, wrong on elec_concept_01
intervention_focus: What do these quantities represent physically? Build meaning before formulas.

description: Understands concepts but weak mathematical manipulation
subject: electricity
diagnosis: Knows physics but weak algebra prevents solving problems
symptoms: Can solve V=IR when solving for V
Cannot solve when asked for I or R
Specific: correct on elec_mech_03, wrong on elec_mech_04

description: Knows formulas but cannot apply to real circuits
subject: electricity
diagnosis: Can solve isolated formula problems but cannot analyze multi-component circuits
symptoms: Specific: correct on elec_mech_03/04, wrong on elec_app_01
intervention_focus: Step-by-step problem solving strategies for circuits

description: Doesn't convert units or confuses quantities
subject: electricity
diagnosis: Persistent unit conversion errors or quantity confusion
symptoms: Leaves time in minutes instead of seconds
intervention_focus: Always write units, check dimensional analysis
